headline: PG&E Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: PCG's first-quarter 2026 EPS beats estimates, revenues rise 15% Y/Y to $6.88 billion, and operating income climbs to $1.47 billion.

headline: Alliant Energy (LNT) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: What to Know Ahead of Q1 Release
summary: Alliant Energy (LNT) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
